text: There was a little girl who loved to draw. Lots of things. Animals. People. Flowers. Most things she drew went well. But cats. Cats were tough. Hard to draw. Maybe too scared. Maybe she just couldn't draw them right. She didn't know these cats. She didn’t know anything about cats.
